items.title: Swedish man jailed for four years for coercing wife into sex with 120 men
items.summary: The 61-year-old was found to have coerced his wife into sexual acts with men he found online in exchange for payment.

items.title: Colorado’s ‘Tamales Act’ Restores Citizens’ Freedom to Buy and Sell Homecooked Food
items.summary: Colorado’s government has restored the freedom of its people to prepare and sell homecooked food to one another. Provided they take a food safety course, the “Tamale Act” is expected to be a boost to…
